final:
module mux_2to1(
    input a,
    input b,
    input sel,
    output y
);

    assign y = sel ? b : a; // Select between a and b based on sel

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      y <= ~sel & a; // Misleadingly set y to a when sel is not selected
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: y <= ~sel & a; // Misleadingly set y to a when sel is not selected
